---
title: "Welcome to My Portfolio"
image: assets/hero.svg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
---

# Full Stack Developer & Data Analyst

Welcome to my digital space. I build elegant solutions to complex problems using modern technologies.

## What I Do

Specializing in **full-stack development**, **data visualization**, and **analytical insights**. Passionate about creating intuitive, high-performance applications and deriving actionable intelligence from data.

## Featured Projects

```{=html}
<div class="content-grid">
  <div class="content-card">
    <h3>🚀 Project One</h3>
    <p>A high-impact project showcasing modern development practices and innovative solutions.</p>
    <a href="projects/index.html" class="btn btn-primary">View Projects →</a>
  </div>
  <div class="content-card">
    <h3>📊 Data Analytics</h3>
    <p>Interactive dashboards and visualizations revealing patterns and insights from complex datasets.</p>
    <a href="analytics.html" class="btn btn-primary">Explore Analytics →</a>
  </div>
  <div class="content-card">
    <h3>📚 Articles & Insights</h3>
    <p>Technical writeups, tutorials, and thoughts on software engineering and data science.</p>
    <a href="blog/index.html" class="btn btn-primary">Read Blog →</a>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Recent Activity

<small>Check out the [blog](blog/index.html) for latest articles and [analytics](analytics.html) for data-driven insights.</small>
